ModuleName: Numerical Methods with SciPy and Curve Fitting

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: Outlines the full sequence of topics covered in the module—including SciPy fundamentals, root finding, numerical integration, interpolation, and curve fitting—serving as a syllabus-style reference that helps learners and instructors navigate the module's content and progression.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: An HTML page listing and briefly explaining all topics covered in the module—including SciPy's ecosystem, numerical methods, and curve fitting—that learners can use as a navigable overview and instructors can use as a syllabus reference for the unit.
